text: 9-1-1, my husband's having a heart attack.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Brooke, we're going to start CPR on him, okay?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: I'm going to tell you what to do.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Are you right next to him?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Put him flat on the floor on his back.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Put the heel of your hand in the center of his chest, right between the nipples.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Push down firmly with only the heels of your hands, 2 inches, and do it 30 times like you're pumping the chest.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: I want you to go this fast, as fast as I'm counting.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: I want you to take a deep breath, stop crying, and start again, okay?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Is he breathing, moving, or coughing at all?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: No, he's just gasping for air.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Keep going until they take over, okay?
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Okay, is the paramedics taking over?
speaker: SPEAKER_00
